transcript.text:
[Isaac Toast for today] [Isaac Burger?]
[Patty on the grill instead of toast]
[10 different kinds of burgers]
It's all set up now
Hello everyone
I'm here today near Shinsa station
Here there? Anyways..
I used to love eating Isaac Toast ever since I was little
I've had everything on the menu before
They are opening an 'Isaac Burger'
This place isn't open yet,
I will go and check it out
Burgers..
I thought they would still be in toasts
A big selection
Let's try it all

Hello
[Tzuyang's fan] I've been waiting for you
Give me all 10 of these
All 10?
1 order of potato fries, 1 order of cheese stick
Fanta as a drink
It will be right up
[An emergency meeting for a big order]
All 10 of them
This is impossible for normal people
[Deciding who will bring it out]
Thank you
Enjoy your meal Thank you
Everything is out
Let's set it up
All set

I've had Isaac Toast many times
So I'm curious to see how Isaac Burger will be like
The signature one
Here is it
Isaac Signature Burger Let's do this one first
I see bacon, tomatoes, lettuce, beef patty
Looks good Bon appetit
Delicious
That's good
Just like a handcrafted burger
Especially the patty
Savory and tasty
Was I hungry?
It's so good
The sauce is very evident here
The patty is very savory

A bit of a smokiness
How should I say this?
The sauce complements it very well
I'll finish it all pretty quickly
There are a lot of ingredients in here
So there are a lot of flavors
Potato fries
It's been a while since I had the crinkle-cut fries
I was expecting it to be pretty soggy, but it's very crispy
There was one with mushroom in it
Here it is Mushroom Beef Burger
You can see sliced on mushroom in here
Does this one not come with veggies?
That's cool Looks good
That's deep
They look very similar, but I thought they would taste similar

It's very different from the signature burger
That's a lot
The taste of the cheese is very thick
The sauce is not watery
I love this because it doesn't have veggies
Classic Burger next
As for this one..
It's a refreshing feeling
The amount of beef patty is just right
Crispy on the outside and soft on the inside
Cheese stick
It's good
A cheese stick is a must when eating burgers
One that doesn't have a beef patty A whole shrimp burger
I see 2 different kinds of sauce in it
Tasty

Yummy
Savory
Oh no It's on my hair
Let's tie it
Double BBQ burger
This is the BBQ one
This is just what I like
Filled with beef
BBQ sauce
It's kind of like a steak sauce
I've had a lot of bulgogi flavored sauces,
But not like a steak sauce
It's gotta be my first time
Diced onions
[mumbling because of it]
I'm pretty sure that..

1 of these will fill you up
[Can't be me though]
Do you need more drinks?
Can I have coca-cola?
Thank you
Thank you
[A coke to wash down a burger is a must]
As for this burger,
This one is a regular bulgogi patty
I really like these bulgogi patties and I enjoy it
But it's definitely different from the handcrafted patties
It has its pros though
Seeing these handcrafted burgers,
Makes me feel like I was able to eat Isaac Toast as a light meal
But not these These are very upgraded
Cheese stick

No cheese pull
Next,
Double cheeseburger I didn't have a cheeseburger yet
Does this one not have any sauce?
This comes with pickles and ketchup
But I asked them not to put that in, so it's plain
Only meat
It's good like this, no?
The patty is so good that it's still good with just cheese and buns
I thought it would just be like any other burger shops
But it's different than expected
Thank you
[Not a coke ad]
I think I've had 1 of everything now
Not the double double
What's double here?

A double cheeseburger is a double double
Having 2 patties
Makes it a lot more juicy
Look at the size of the patty
Smoked BBQ Burger
Something I would eat in America
Definitely lighter than that, but
You can taste the meat for sure
Last one
A mushroom double burger
Filled with mushrooms
Half of it is patty
It's like meat
People will get full after eating 1 of these
If I were to pick my top 1 from these
I would have to go with the Signature Burger even though I excluded the ketchup on it

Mushroom Burger comes 2nd
The handcrafted patty on it was delicious
[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need] Thanks everyone
